subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Thy letter was received, and it became evident that thou wert saddened by the previous response. This was not intended [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی نامه شما رسید و معلوم گردید که از جواب سابق محزون شدید مقصود نه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @station of the Manifestation of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
